test.details: 167 repo tests + 127 browser-use-discovery tests, all pass, 0 failures

appliedUpdates.description: Added write execution ordering (batchUpdateRows before appendRows) and SheetWriteError pattern documentation to architecture.md Google Sheets writer section

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that 'Validation mode is real integrations only (no mocks)' applies to user-testing validation milestones (browser-based end-to-end), not to worker feature implementation tests which appropriately use dependency-injected mocks. This prevents future worker confusion about whether mocked tests are acceptable in feature work.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-area-preset-lineage-and-truthful-terminal-outcomes uses mocked dependencies in integration tests, which is consistent with other worker features in this mission but appears to conflict with AGENTS.md's blanket 'no mocks' statement.

rejectedObservations.observation: SheetWriteError pattern should be documented in AGENTS.md as a convention for future error types
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous — this is a convention suggestion that may not generalize yet; the pattern exists in 2 error types (SheetWriteError, TimeoutError) which is not enough to establish a project-wide convention

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed skill correctly, no deviations
rejectedObservations.reason: no action needed — procedural confirmation not a shared state observation

rejectedObservations.reason: no action needed — absence of change requires no documentation
